name: new-ip-tb
description: New IP testbench from scratch: MAS §9 DV Plan → tc_ sequences → TB top → SVA → SIM loop → coverage

tasks.content: Read MAS DV Plan and DUT RTL — extract all verification requirements
tasks.detail: Read <ip_name>/mas/<ip_name>_mas.md completely. From §2: extract full port list for DUT instantiation. From §4: register offsets, bitfields, access types for CSR sequences. From §5: interrupt sources, enable/status registers, W1C clear for interrupt sequences. From §6: memory depth/width/latency for memory sequences. From §9: list ALL test sequences S1-SN, coverage goals (line/branch/toggle targets), SVA assertions. Then read <ip_name>/rtl/<ip_name>.sv — confirm ports match MAS §2. Do NOT write code yet.

tasks.content: Write tc_<module>.sv: S1 reset and S2 basic operation sequences
tasks.detail: task tc_S1_reset(): assert rst for 3+ cycles, deassert, verify all outputs at reset values from MAS §2. task tc_S2_normal_op(): drive inputs per MAS §3 Feature Operation, sample outputs, compare to expected. Use pass_cnt/fail_cnt. Print [PASS]/[FAIL] per test.

tasks.content: Write tc_<module>.sv: S3 interrupt flow sequences (if MAS §5 present)
tasks.detail: task tc_S3_interrupt(): (1) enable interrupt in INT_ENABLE reg, (2) trigger interrupt source condition, (3) check irq asserts within 1 cycle, (4) write INT_STATUS W1C clear, (5) verify irq deasserts within 1 cycle. Repeat for each interrupt source in MAS §5. Skip if no §5.

tasks.content: Write tc_<module>.sv: S4 memory R/W and S5–SN remaining sequences
tasks.detail: task tc_S4_memory(): write known pattern to memory (all offsets), read back, compare — skip if no §6. Implement all remaining sequences S5-SN from MAS §9 table: S5 back-to-back, S6 error injection, S7 corner cases. Each sequence as a separate task. Add tc_boundary() for min/max parameter edge cases.

tasks.content: Add SVA assertions (from MAS §9 coverage goals)
tasks.detail: Add all SVA assertions listed in MAS §9: FSM no illegal state transitions, irq deasserts within 1 cycle of W1C, FIFO no overflow/underflow, register reset values. Bind assertions in TB with 'bind <module> <assertion_module> u_assert(...)'. Each assertion fires $error on violation.

Write to <ip_name>/tb/tb_<ip_name>.sv. Include: `default_nettype none, `include "tc_<ip_name>.sv", declare all DUT port signals (from MAS §2), DUT instantiation with named port connections, clock gen (always #5 clk=~clk), reset sequence, $dumpfile("../sim/<ip_name>_wave.vcd")/$dumpvars, call all tc_ tasks in S1-SN order, print final 'Result: N/M passed', $finish.

Compile: iverilog -g2012 -f <ip>/list/<ip>.f <ip>/tb/tb_<ip>.sv -o <ip>/sim/<ip>.out && vvp <ip>/sim/<ip>.out. Check for [FAIL] lines and $error. Diagnose: TB bug → fix <ip>/tb/tc_<ip>.sv; DUT bug → [MAS ESCALATE] rtl-gen (do NOT edit <ip>/rtl/<ip>.sv). Write <ip>/sim/sim_report.txt. Loop until all [PASS] and 0 errors, 0 warnings.

tasks.content: Coverage review: meet MAS §9 targets (line ≥90%, branch ≥85%, toggle ≥80%)
tasks.detail: Run /coverage <ip_name>. Read <ip_name>/sim/sim_report.txt. Compare against MAS §9 coverage goals from <ip_name>/mas/<ip_name>_mas.md. For each gap: identify untested state/condition, add targeted tc_ task, re-run sim. FSM: all states visited. Interrupts: all sources fired and cleared. Registers: all RW bits toggled. Report coverage summary.
